title: FLAIR: French Land Cover from Aerospace Imagery
description: Land use and land cover classification from high-resolution aerial imagery. Annotators classify the primary land use category of aerial image patches and identify any secondary land uses present. Based on the FLAIR dataset from the French National Institute of Geographic and Forest Information (IGN).
citation:

    year = "2023",
